schemes.name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.benefit: Rs. 6000 per year (3 installments of Rs. 2000) directly in bank account
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with land holding up to 2 hectares. Must be Indian citizen. Aadhaar card and bank account mandatory.
schemes.not_eligible: Income taxpayers, government employees, pensioners above Rs. 10000/month, constitutional post holders
schemes.how_to_apply: Nearest Common Service Centre (CSC), PM-Kisan portal pmkisan.gov.in, or through local Patwari/Revenue officer
schemes.hindi_summary: PM Kisan yojana mein chote aur marginal kisanon ko har saal Rs. 6000 teen installments mein milte hain. Seedha bank mein aate hain. Aadhaar aur bank account zaroori hai.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.benefit: Rs. 5 lakh per family per year health insurance for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation
schemes.eligibility: Families listed in SECC 2011 database. BPL families. Annual income below Rs. 1 lakh. SC/ST households automatically eligible.
schemes.not_eligible: Families with government jobs, motorized vehicle, farmers with 5+ acres land, income tax payers
schemes.how_to_apply: Visit nearest empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card. Ayushman Mitra at hospital helps. pmjay.gov.in website or 14555 helpline.
schemes.hindi_summary: Ayushman Bharat mein garib pariwaaron ko 5 lakh rupaye tak ka free ilaaj milta hai. Empanelled hospital mein Aadhaar lekar jaao, Ayushman Mitra madad karta hai.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection (cylinder + stove). First refill subsidised. Women empowerment through clean cooking fuel.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 18+ from BPL households. No existing LPG connection at home. Must be on SECC 2011 list or BPL ration card holder.
schemes.not_eligible: Households already having LPG connection. APL ration card holders without BPL status.
schemes.how_to_apply: Nearest LPG distributor (HP Gas, Bharat Gas, Indane). KYC form + documents submit karo.
schemes.hindi_summary: Ujjwala Yojana BPL mahilaon ko free LPG connection deti hai. Nearest gas distributor pe jaake KYC form bharo. Aadhaar aur BPL ration card chahiye.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
schemes.benefit: Rs. 1.20 lakh (plain areas) or Rs. 1.30 lakh (hilly/NE areas) for construction of pucca house. Payment in 3 installments.
schemes.eligibility: Homeless families or those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses. Listed in SECC 2011. SC/ST, minorities, widows, disabled persons given priority.
schemes.not_eligible: Persons already owning a pucca house anywhere in India. Income tax payers. Persons with more than 2.5 acres irrigated land.
schemes.how_to_apply: Through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Officer (BDO). AwaasSoft portal. Awas App on mobile.
schemes.hindi_summary: PMAY-G mein kutche ghar mein rehne walon ko pucca ghar banane ke liye 1.20 lakh milta hai. Gram Panchayat ya BDO se apply karo. SECC 2011 mein naam hona chahiye.

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC
schemes.benefit: Full tuition fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance (Rs. 380 to Rs. 1200/month depending on course and hostel status)
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST/OBC students studying post-matric (Class 11 onwards). Annual family income below Rs. 2.5 lakh for OBC, Rs. 2 lakh for SC/ST.
schemes.not_eligible: Students already availing another scholarship. Correspondence/distance courses sometimes excluded.
schemes.how_to_apply: National Scholarship Portal scholarships.gov.in via school/college. State social welfare department.
schemes.hindi_summary: SC/ST/OBC students ko 11th ke baad scholarship milti hai. Poorni fees + pocket money. Scholarships.gov.in pe apply karo. Income 2.5 lakh se kam honi chahiye.

schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme - Old Age Pension
schemes.benefit: Rs. 200 to Rs. 500 per month from Centre + state top-up (Karnataka mein Rs. 400 extra = total ~Rs. 600-900/month)
schemes.eligibility: Age 60 years or above. BPL household. No other significant source of income or government pension.
schemes.not_eligible: Persons receiving any other government pension. Persons with income above BPL threshold.
schemes.how_to_apply: Gram Panchayat ya Ward Office mein application. District Social Welfare Office.
schemes.hindi_summary: 60 saal se upar BPL bujurgon ko har mahine pension milti hai. Karnataka mein combined 600-900 rupaye tak. Gram Panchayat mein apply karo.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free business loans: Shishu (up to Rs. 50,000), Kishor (Rs. 50,000 to 5 lakh), Tarun (Rs. 5 lakh to 10 lakh)
schemes.eligibility: Non-farm small/micro enterprises. Street vendors, shopkeepers, artisans, small traders. No defaulters. Aadhaar mandatory.
schemes.not_eligible: Loan defaulters. Agricultural activities (PM-Kisan covers them). Large enterprises.
schemes.how_to_apply: Any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Mudra portal udyamimitra.in. No collateral required.
schemes.hindi_summary: MUDRA mein chote business ke liye bina guarantor ke loan milta hai. Rs. 50,000 se Rs. 10 lakh tak. Kisi bhi bank mein jaake apply kar sakte hain.

schemes.name: Divyang Sahara Yojana (Disability Pension)
schemes.benefit: Monthly pension Rs. 500 to Rs. 1500. Assistive devices. Educational scholarships for disabled children.
schemes.eligibility: Persons with 40%+ disability certified by medical board. BPL household. Age 18+.
schemes.not_eligible: Persons with disability less than 40%. Persons receiving other disability benefits from state/centre.
schemes.how_to_apply: District Social Welfare Department. Disability certificate from government hospital medical board first.
schemes.hindi_summary: 40% ya zyada disability wale BPL logon ko monthly pension milti hai. Pehle sarkaari hospital se disability certificate banwao, phir Social Welfare Department mein apply karo.

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi — Street Vendor Loan
schemes.benefit: Working capital loan: Rs. 10,000 first loan, Rs. 20,000 on repayment, Rs. 50,000 on third loan. Digital transactions incentive.
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors vending in urban areas. Must have Certificate of Vending or Letter of Recommendation from ULB.
schemes.not_eligible: Non-street vendors. Rural vendors (they have other schemes). Loan defaulters.
schemes.how_to_apply: pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in portal. Urban Local Body office ya nearest bank branch.
schemes.hindi_summary: Rehdi-patri lagane walon ke liye PM SVANidhi se Rs. 10,000 pehla loan milta hai. Bina guarantee ke. ULB certificate chahiye. Digital payment karne pe extra bonus milta hai.

schemes.name: BPL Ration Card (National Food Security Act)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
schemes.benefit: 5 kg grain per person per month at Rs. 2/kg (wheat) and Rs. 3/kg (rice). Priority Household (PHH) gets more.
schemes.eligibility: Annual household income below poverty line. SECC 2011 listed. Not owning more than defined land/assets.
schemes.not_eligible: APL families. Income tax payers. Government employees. Families with 4-wheeler vehicles.
schemes.how_to_apply: District Food & Civil Supplies office. Gram Panchayat. Online: state food portal.
schemes.hindi_summary: BPL ration card se 5 kg anaaj per person sirf 2-3 rupaye kilo milta hai. District Food Office ya Gram Panchayat mein apply karo. Aadhaar zaroori hai.

general_info.purpose: Political intelligence and welfare scheme saturation mapping for Karnataka booths
general_info.target_beneficiaries: BPL families, farmers, students, women, elderly, disabled persons
